title: Remove 'Built by Caffeine AI' attribution from footer

requirements.text: Remove the 'Built by Caffeine AI' attribution text and any associated link or UTM tracking from the Footer component. All other footer content (brand logo, quick navigation links, contact details, copyright notice) must remain unchanged.

quotes: take built by caffeine AI off of the website on the bottom of the website take it off where it says caffeine AI

acceptanceCriteria: The footer no longer displays any text, link, or element referencing 'Caffeine AI' or 'Built by Caffeine AI'.
All other footer content (logo, nav links, contact info, copyright) is preserved exactly as in Version 20.
No broken layout or empty gap is left where the attribution previously appeared.

constraints: Do not modify any other section or component beyond the Footer's Caffeine AI attribution.
Preserve all Version 20 content and styling everywhere else on the site.
nonGoals: Modifying the Header, HeroSection, MenuSection, CateringSection, or ContactSection.
